reviews.comment:

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13657899365243523321/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25Gc01GRmhOMmh4ZWxwV2ExRnVhbTFvVms1cFdsRRAB

reviews.comment:
Me atendió la señorita Sofía, que ante mi sorpresa atendió primero si que llegó último y se molestó por mi reclamo. Vino su compañero que como es normal en el ACA me atendió excelente. Por favor recordarle a esta señorita que no sirve enojarse sino atender a quien está primero . Muchas gracias

(Translated by Google)
I was helped by Miss Sofia, who, to my surprise, served me first even though she arrived last and was annoyed by my complaint. Her colleague then came and, as is typical at the ACA, provided excellent service. Please remind this young lady that getting angry is pointless; she should attend to the person who arrived first. Thank you very much.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13657899365243523321/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2psalpFRjRaVE5vTm5ablpVNTFWV3RGYUUwNU4yYxAB
